meaning: n.奥德修斯(古希腊荷马所作史诗<<奥德赛>>中的主人公,伊塞卡国王,在特洛伊战中献木马计)
examples: In the Odyssey, king Odysseus of Ithaca proves his royal status to king Alcinous of the Faiakes.
It is clearly modeled on Odysseus' descent to Hades in the Odyssey.
Some scholars claim it was here Odysseus dallied for seven years with the goddess Calypso.
But it is also Odysseus himself, by his very example, who has seduced them into showing him such favours.
